e1_sentence: On the Day of Uhud, The Messenger of Allah, may Allah bless him and grant him  peace, said, 'Who will bring me news of Sad ibn al-Rabi al-Ansari?
e2_sentence: A man said,  'Me, Messenger of Allah!

e1_sentence: A man said,  'Me, Messenger of Allah!
e2_sentence: So the man went around among the slain, and Sad ibn  al-Rabi said to him, 'What are you doing?
